description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On April 6, 2023 at 10:48 AM PST a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on Randall Street near Harper Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was proceeding northwest on Randall Street near the intersection with Harper Street when it came to a stop to yield to a 
heavy truck traveling southeast on Randall Street. As the heavy truck drove past the Waymo AV, the driver’s side section of the heavy truck 
made contact with the rear driver’s side sensor of the Waymo AV. The heavy truck then left the scene. At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
